patches.description: Removes the $c<number> helper classes and reflection method-holder classes left by pairip.

patches.description: Restores obfuscated strings and removes pairip bytecode protection.

patches.description: Inlines methods hidden in $c<number> helper classes back into the host class.
patches.name: Restore extracted methods
